---
title: "Rejection Type Multivariate Analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(vegan)

if (!requireNamespace("clustsig", quietly = TRUE)) {
	stop("Package 'clustsig' is required for SIMPROF. Install with install.packages('clustsig').")
}

# install.packages("remotes")
# remotes::install_github("cran/clustsig")
```

## Load Data

```{r load-data}
# Read the rejected_cattle tab of the Excel file.
rejections <- read_xlsx(
	here("data", "raw", "cattle port data.xlsx"),
	sheet = "rejected_cattle"
)

glimpse(rejections)
```

```{r simplify rejection reasons}
#load in rejection reason key
rejection_reason_key <- read_xlsx(
    here("data", "raw", "cattle port data.xlsx"),
    sheet = "at_risk_reasoning"
)
#This isn't necessary but can be used to further delineate groups; just leaving it here for now.

#combine any elevated_nws_risk == 'no' into a reason_rejected == 'not_nws_risk'

rejections <- rejections |>
    mutate(reason_rejected = if_else(
        elevated_nws_risk == "no",
        "not_nws_risk",
        reason_rejected
    )) |>
    group_by(port, year, reason_rejected) |>
    summarise(volume = sum(volume, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
```


## Prepare Community Matrix (Pivot Wider)

```{r prep-community-matrix}
# Build one sample per port-year and pivot rejection reasons to columns.
rejections_wide <- rejections %>%
	mutate(
		year = as.factor(year),
		port = as.factor(port)
	) %>%
    filter(!reason_rejected == "exposed_to_ticky_lot") %>% # Exclude this reason as it did not exist for 2022
	group_by(port, year, reason_rejected) %>%
	summarise(volume = sum(volume, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
	pivot_wider(
		names_from = reason_rejected,
		values_from = volume,
		values_fill = 0
	)

# Preserve sample metadata and extract numeric species matrix.
rejections_wide <- rejections_wide %>%
	mutate(sample_id = paste(port, year, sep = "_"))


# Preserve sample metadata and extract numeric species matrix.
sample_meta <- rejections_wide %>%
	select(sample_id, port, year)

community <- rejections_wide %>%
	select(-port, -year) %>%
	mutate(across(everything(), ~ replace_na(.x, 0))) %>%
	as.data.frame()

rownames(community) <- sample_meta$sample_id

# Remove all-zero rows, which break Bray-Curtis style analysis.
row_totals <- rowSums(community, na.rm = TRUE)
keep_rows <- row_totals > 0

community <- community[keep_rows, , drop = FALSE]
sample_meta <- sample_meta[keep_rows, , drop = FALSE]

cat("Samples retained:", nrow(community), "\n")
cat("Rejection reasons (columns):", ncol(community), "\n")
head(rejections_wide)
```

## PCA (Above nMDS)

```{r pca}
# Hellinger transformation is commonly used before PCA for count composition data.
community_hell <- decostand(community, method = "hellinger")

pca <- prcomp(community_hell, center = TRUE, scale. = FALSE)

pca_var <- summary(pca)$importance[2, ]

pca_scores <- as.data.frame(pca$x[, 1:2, drop = FALSE]) %>%
	mutate(
		port = sample_meta$port,
		year = sample_meta$year,
		sample_id = sample_meta$sample_id
	)

ellipse_ports_pca <- pca_scores %>%
	count(port, name = "n") %>%
	filter(n >= 3) %>%
	pull(port)

pca_plot <- ggplot(pca_scores, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = port, shape = year)) +
	geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.9) +
	theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
	labs(
		title = "PCA of Rejection Composition (Hellinger transformed)",
		subtitle = paste0(
			"PC1 = ", round(100 * pca_var[1], 1),
			"%, PC2 = ", round(100 * pca_var[2], 1), "%"
		),
		x = paste0("PC1 (", round(100 * pca_var[1], 1), "%)"),
		y = paste0("PC2 (", round(100 * pca_var[2], 1), "%)"),
		color = "Port",
		shape = "Year"
	)

if (length(ellipse_ports_pca) > 0) {
	pca_plot <- pca_plot +
		stat_ellipse(
			data = pca_scores %>% filter(port %in% ellipse_ports_pca),
			aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, group = port, color = port),
			linewidth = 0.5,
			alpha = 0.4,
			show.legend = FALSE,
			inherit.aes = FALSE
		)
}

pca_plot <- pca_plot +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "D")

pca_fig <- here("outputs", "figures", "rejection_pca.png")
ggsave(
	filename = pca_fig,
	plot = pca_plot,
	width = 10,
	height = 7,
	dpi = 150
)

cat("PCA figure saved to:", pca_fig, "\n")
knitr::include_graphics(pca_fig)
```

## PCA Biplot (vegan)

```{r pca-biplot-vegan}
# Vegan biplot with site scores and variable vectors from a PCA-equivalent rda.
pca_vegan <- rda(community_hell)

pca_biplot_fig <- here("outputs", "figures", "rejection_pca_biplot_vegan.png")
png(pca_biplot_fig, width = 1700, height = 1200, res = 150)
biplot(
	pca_vegan,
	scaling = 2,
	main = "PCA biplot (vegan::rda, scaling = 2)",
	xlab = "PC1",
	ylab = "PC2"
)
dev.off()

cat("Vegan PCA biplot saved to:", pca_biplot_fig, "\n")
knitr::include_graphics(pca_biplot_fig)
```

## nMDS (By Port and Year)

```{r nmds}
set.seed(2026)

nmds <- metaMDS(
	community,
	distance = "bray",
	k = 3,
	trymax = 200,
	autotransform = FALSE
)

scores_df <- as.data.frame(scores(nmds, display = "sites")) %>%
	mutate(
		port = sample_meta$port,
		year = sample_meta$year,
		sample_id = sample_meta$sample_id
	)

cat("nMDS stress:", round(nmds$stress, 4), "\n")

ellipse_ports <- scores_df %>%
	count(port, name = "n") %>%
	filter(n >= 3) %>%
	pull(port)

nmds_plot <- ggplot(scores_df, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, color = port, shape = year)) +
	geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.9) +
	theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
	labs(
		title = "nMDS of Rejection Composition",
		subtitle = paste("Bray-Curtis distance | stress =", round(nmds$stress, 4)),
		x = "NMDS1",
		y = "NMDS2",
		color = "Port",
		shape = "Year"
	)

if (length(ellipse_ports) > 0) {
	nmds_plot <- nmds_plot +
		stat_ellipse(
			data = scores_df %>% filter(port %in% ellipse_ports),
			aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, group = port, color = port),
			linewidth = 0.5,
			alpha = 0.4,
			show.legend = FALSE,
			inherit.aes = FALSE
		)
} else {
	cat("Ellipses skipped: no port has at least 3 samples.\n")
}

nmds_plot <- nmds_plot +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "D")

nmds_fig <- here("outputs", "figures", "rejection_nmds.png")
ggsave(
	filename = nmds_fig,
	plot = nmds_plot,
	width = 10,
	height = 7,
	dpi = 150
)

cat("nMDS figure saved to:", nmds_fig, "\n")
knitr::include_graphics(nmds_fig)
```

## nMDS Colored By SIMPROF Group

```{r nmds-simprof}
# Merge SIMPROF group assignments with nMDS scores
nmds_scores <- as.data.frame(scores(nmds, display = "sites")) %>%
  mutate(sample_id = rownames(.))

# Ensure cluster_df is a data frame with proper column names
cluster_df <- as.data.frame(cluster_df)
colnames(cluster_df) <- c("sample_id", "simprof_groups")

# Merge nMDS scores with SIMPROF group assignments
nmds_scores <- nmds_scores %>%
  left_join(cluster_df, by = "sample_id")

# Create nMDS plot colored by SIMPROF groups
nmds_simprof_plot <- ggplot(nmds_scores, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, color = as.factor(simprof_groups))) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sample_id), size = 3, hjust = 0.5, vjust = -0.5, check_overlap = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    title = "nMDS of Rejection Composition Colored by SIMPROF Groups",
    x = "NMDS1",
    y = "NMDS2",
    color = "SIMPROF Group"
  ) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "D")

# Save the plot
nmds_simprof_fig <- here("outputs", "figures", "rejection_nmds_simprof.png")
ggsave(
  filename = nmds_simprof_fig,
  plot = nmds_simprof_plot,
  width = 10,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 150
)

cat("nMDS SIMPROF-colored figure saved to:", nmds_simprof_fig, "\n")
knitr::include_graphics(nmds_simprof_fig)
```

## Cluster Analysis (Hierarchical)

```{r cluster-analysis}
bc_dist <- vegdist(community, method = "bray")
hc <- hclust(bc_dist, method = "average")

cluster_fig <- here("outputs", "figures", "rejection_cluster_dendrogram.png")

png(cluster_fig, width = 1600, height = 1000, res = 150)
plot(
	hc,
	labels = rownames(community),
	main = "Hierarchical Clustering of Port-Year Samples",
	xlab = "",
	sub = "Bray-Curtis distance, average linkage",
	cex = 0.8
)
dev.off()

cat("Cluster dendrogram saved to:", cluster_fig, "\n")
knitr::include_graphics(cluster_fig)
```

## SIMPROF

```{r simprof}
simprof_res <- clustsig::simprof(
	data = community,
	method.cluster = "average",
	method.distance = "braycurtis",
	sample.orientation = "row",
	alpha = 0.05,
	num.expected = 1000,
	num.simulated = 999
)

print(simprof_res)

simprof_fig <- here("outputs", "figures", "rejection_simprof.png")
png(simprof_fig, width = 1600, height = 1000, res = 150)

# clustsig objects may not always dispatch an S3 plot method in every session.
if (!is.null(getS3method("plot", "simprof", optional = TRUE))) {
	plot(simprof_res)
} else if (exists("simprof.plot", where = asNamespace("clustsig"), mode = "function")) {
	get("simprof.plot", envir = asNamespace("clustsig"))(simprof_res)
} else if (!is.null(simprof_res$hclust)) {
	plot(
		simprof_res$hclust,
		main = "SIMPROF clustering (dendrogram fallback)",
		xlab = "",
		sub = "Significance object printed above"
	)
} else {
	plot.new()
	text(0.5, 0.5, "SIMPROF plot method unavailable; see printed object.")
}

dev.off()
cat("SIMPROF figure saved to:", simprof_fig, "\n")
knitr::include_graphics(simprof_fig)
```

## SIMPROF Group Assignments

```{r simprof-groups}
# simprof output is a list with row names as values in a vector; position of element in list corresponds to a significant cluster.

#Build a data frame to capture sample_id and simprof group assignment.
rows <- NULL
groups <- NULL

for (i in seq_along(simprof_res$significantclusters)) {
    rows <- c(rows,simprof_res$significantclusters[[i]])
    groups <- c(groups, rep(paste0("Cluster ", i), length(simprof_res$significantclusters[[i]]))
    )
    cluster_df <- data.frame(
        sample_id = rows,
        simprof_group = groups
    )
}
```

## PCA Biplot Colored By SIMPROF Group

```{r pca-biplot-simprof}

# PCA-equivalent ordination from vegan for a biplot with species vectors.
pca_vegan_simprof <- rda(community_hell)
site_scores <- scores(pca_vegan_simprof, display = "sites", choices = 1:2, scaling = 2)
species_scores <- scores(pca_vegan_simprof, display = "species", choices = 1:2, scaling = 2)


simprof_group = factor(cluster_df$simprof_group)
group_levels <- levels(simprof_group)
group_palette <- setNames(
	grDevices::hcl.colors(length(group_levels), palette = "Dark 3"),
	group_levels
)
site_cols <- group_palette[as.character(simprof_group)]

pca_simprof_fig <- here("outputs", "figures", "rejection_pca_biplot_simprof.png")
png(pca_simprof_fig, width = 1700, height = 1200, res = 150)

plot(
	site_scores[, 1],
	site_scores[, 2],
	type = "n",
	xlab = "PC1 (scaling 2)",
	ylab = "PC2 (scaling 2)",
	main = "PCA biplot colored by SIMPROF group"
)
abline(h = 0, v = 0, col = "grey80", lty = 3)

points(site_scores[, 1], site_scores[, 2], pch = 19, col = site_cols, cex = 1.1)
text(
	species_scores[, 1],
	species_scores[, 2],
	labels = rownames(species_scores),
	col = "grey30",
	cex = 0.72,
	pos = 4
)
arrows(
	x0 = 0,
	y0 = 0,
	x1 = species_scores[, 1],
	y1 = species_scores[, 2],
	length = 0.06,
	col = "grey45"
)

legend(
	"topright",
	legend = names(group_palette),
	col = unname(group_palette),
	pch = 19,
	title = "SIMPROF group",
	bty = "n"
)

dev.off()
cat("SIMPROF-colored PCA biplot saved to:", pca_simprof_fig, "\n")
knitr::include_graphics(pca_simprof_fig)
```

## SIMPER (Port and Year)

```{r simper}
# SIMPER by port
simper_port <- NULL
if (dplyr::n_distinct(sample_meta$port) > 1) {
	simper_port <- simper(community, group = sample_meta$port, permutations = 999)
	cat("SIMPER by port completed.\n")
	print(summary(simper_port))
} else {
	cat("SIMPER by port skipped: only one port present.\n")
}

# SIMPER by year
simper_year <- NULL
if (dplyr::n_distinct(sample_meta$year) > 1) {
	simper_year <- simper(community, group = sample_meta$year, permutations = 999)
	cat("SIMPER by year completed.\n")
	print(summary(simper_year))
} else {
	cat("SIMPER by year skipped: only one year present.\n")
}
```
## Save SIMPROF groupings
```{r save data}
# Assign cluster groupings by sample_id to rejections_wide
rejections_wide <- rejections_wide %>%
  left_join(cluster_df, by = "sample_id")

# Export the updated table as .rds and .csv files
output_dir <- here("outputs", "tables")
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

rds_path <- file.path(output_dir, "rejections_wide_with_clusters.rds")
csv_path <- file.path(output_dir, "rejections_wide_with_clusters.csv")

saveRDS(rejections_wide, rds_path)
write_csv(rejections_wide, csv_path)

cat("Rejections wide table with clusters saved to:", rds_path, "and", csv_path, "\n")
```
